parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
box "Client"
participant client
participant tcpclient
end box

box "Server"
participant tcpserver
participant server
end box

server -> tcpserver : listen
activate tcpserver #0077ff
hnote over tcpserver #0077ff : LISTEN

client -> tcpclient : connect
activate client
activate tcpclient #00aaaa
tcpclient -> tcpserver : SYN
deactivate tcpserver
hnote over tcpclient #00aaaa : SYN-SENT
activate tcpserver #00aaff
hnote over tcpserver #00aaff : SYN-RECEIVED
tcpserver -> tcpclient : SYN, ACK
deactivate tcpclient
deactivate tcpserver

tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK
activate tcpclient #99cc99
hnote over tcpclient #99cc99 : ESTABLISHED
activate tcpserver #99cc99
hnote over tcpserver #99cc99 : ESTABLISHED

tcpserver -> server : EPOLLIN
activate server
server -> tcpserver : write
tcpserver -> tcpclient : PSH, ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK
tcpclient -> client : EPOLLIN
deactivate client
activate client
client -> tcpclient : read
deactivate client
deactivate tcpclient
deactivate tcpserver

server -> tcpserver : close
activate tcpserver #bbaadd
hnote over tcpserver #bbaadd : FIN_WAIT1
tcpserver -> tcpclient : FIN, ACK
deactivate tcpserver
activate tcpclient #ee88ee
hnote over tcpclient #ee88ee : CLOSE_WAIT
tcpclient -> tcpserver : ACK
activate tcpserver #ffaa66
hnote over tcpserver #ffaa66 : FIN_WAIT2
tcpclient -> client : EPOLLRDHUP
deactivate tcpclient
activate client
client -> tcpclient : close
deactivate client
activate tcpclient #ff00ff
hnote over tcpclient #ff00ff : LAST_ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver : FIN
deactivate tcpserver
tcpserver -> tcpclient : ACK
deactivate tcpclient
activate tcpserver #ffff66
hnote over tcpserver #ffff66 : TIMEWAIT
hnote over tcpclient #ff6666 : CLOSE
tcpserver --> tcpserver : timer 60s
deactivate tcpserver
hnote over tcpserver #ff6666 : CLOSE
deactivate server

@enduml
```
